Raven.A1
Hardware and software binary release

xxxxxx:
      
  rom:
    - rvbios is now in rom.
      (old c:\auto\rvbios.prg is automatically deleted)
    - improved flash init and detect
    - wip pram area in flash (expanded from old 4kb to 16kb)

  firmware: (rom programmer)
    - support roms with 16kb pram area
